Tool
Synopsys FC
Key Contributions
  • Optimized macro placement via flight line analysis — minimized wirelength and congestion
  • Resolved cell density hotspots using multiple FC app options and placement strategies
  • Analysed critical timing paths; applied buffer insertion and cell sizing ECO fixes
  • Achieved full timing closure — resolved setup and hold violations through ECO flows
  • Performed DRC cleanup and antenna fixing during post-route sign-off

240 & 540 MHz
Clock Domains

Tool
Synopsys FC
Key Contributions
  • Manual macro placement by analysing flight line data — iterated floorplans to minimise congestion
  • Resolved placement-induced congestion using FC optimization techniques
  • Created and tuned path groups to prioritize critical timing paths and improve QoR
  • Met timing targets across 240MHz and 540MHz domains via placement constraints
  • Top-layer manual routing for critical nets; resolved DRC, LVS, and antenna violations
